common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

receipt.title: Receipt
receipt.notFoundBody: The link has expired or is incorrect. Ask the staff for a new code.

loyalty.title: Loyalty card
loyalty.full: Card is full — show it to the staff to get your reward 🎉

issue.title: Receipts
issue.empty: No receipts yet — issue your first one above.
issue.invalidInput: Please fill in all fields correctly.
issue.scanQr: Customer scans to open the receipt:
issue.terminalQr: Print this QR at the counter — customers scan it to get their latest receipt:

merchantSetup.title: Set up your business
merchantSetup.intro: One step before you can issue receipts.

claim.noReceiptBody: No receipt has been issued at {merchant} in the last 15 minutes. Please ask the staff.

landing.heroSub: Customers scan or tap — and have their receipt instantly. No app, no email, no paper.
landing.tap1: You ring up the sale as usual
landing.tap2: The customer scans the QR at the counter
landing.review1: One tap to leave a review
landing.review2: Right at the moment of purchase
landing.loyalty1: A loyalty card they'll never lose
landing.vat1: VAT per rate on every receipt
landing.oldWayBody: Printer, paper rolls, stamp cards and review stands — each its own expense.
landing.newWayBody: One QR tile at the counter replaces all of it. And the paper.
landing.priceNote: Free trial period — pay only once it works for you. Cancel anytime.
landing.euTitle: Your data stays in the EU.
landing.euBody: Everything is hosted in the EU (Sweden). No trackers on the receipt page. GDPR from day one — customer data only with consent.
